FAQs

Got Questions? We’ve Got Answers.

1 Do I need SEO knowledge to use this tool?
No — the tool is built for non-technical users.
2 Will the audit work on my CMS (Shopify / WordPress / Webflow)?
Yes - You can export professional SEO reports (PDF or shareable links) to send to clients, use for proposals, or track performance over time.
3 Can I export SEO reports for clients?
Yes - You can export professional SEO reports (PDF or shareable links) to send to clients, use for proposals, or track performance over time.
4 What happens after the trial?

After the trial ends:

  • You can upgrade to a paid plan to continue running audits and saving reports
  • Or simply stop — no automatic charges if you don’t upgrade
Your trial reports remain accessible.
5 Will running the audit affect my page speed or live site?
No - The audit is read-only and does not modify your website, generate extra load, or impact site speed or user experience.
